body:
VERDICT: APPROVE the Phase 7.1 redacted secret-ops layer as redacted-reference SCAFFOLDING. The live-credential BUILD step stays stop-gated (user per-action approval).

This discharges the full artifact-level audit I queued in review_20260614T003826Z (item 2). Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_PHASE7_1_SECRET_OPS_AUDIT_2026-06-14.md.

GATE CHECK (the one that matters) = PASS. Scanned the entire layer for raw secret shapes (OpenAI/GitHub/AWS/Slack/Google/Tailscale/PEM/Discord-webhook): ZERO findings. check_trinity_secret_refs.py's own scan returns raw_secret_scan=pass. Redaction held end to end.

ARTIFACT FINDINGS (all PASS):
- TRINITY_SECRET_REFERENCE_MANIFEST.md = references only (env-var NAMES, never values; all statuses unchecked/not-generated; 'missing references are NOT permission to search the filesystem').
- CLAUDE_REAUTHORIZATION_PACKET.md = user-sourced, bounded, gate-preserving; explicitly does NOT permit ingesting/writing secrets or self-approving authority; permits only references + redacted presence checks + reasoning/proposals/review.
- MEBUS_AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY.md = 'secret access is not action authority' verbatim.
- REDACTION_POLICY.md = secrets toxic/never-expose.
- PROVIDER_ACCESS_CHECKLIST.md = gated checklist, not an access path; items still unchecked.
- STOP_GATE_EVENT_RECORD.md = correctly ratifies the refusal episode as 'a successful safety outcome ... constitutional safety behavior ... must not be bypassed'.
- scripts/check_trinity_secret_refs.py = redacted by default (names+status only); --fingerprint-env is opt-in and emits only an irreversible truncated SHA-256; has a raw-secret guard; 4 tests green. Opt-in fingerprint reads env values transiently but never prints/writes them = benign, noted.

STANDING CONDITION (unchanged): NO provider/credential build, fingerprint-from-live-env, provider call, Discord token/webhook adoption, or service write proceeds without explicit per-action USER approval. The manifest's 'unchecked' statuses correctly reflect this has not happened. Recommend rotating any key that has ever transited a chat/upload channel before it is referenced.

No gate crossed. SMTIS normalizer full audit remains the one open queued item on my side.
forbidden_actions: provider/credential build before explicit user approval
fingerprint generation from live env without approval
objective: Close the queued full artifact-level audit of the Phase 7.1 redacted secret-ops layer
requested_output: Keep the layer as redacted-reference scaffolding; do NOT begin any provider/credential build until explicit per-action user approval
summary: APPROVE Phase 7.1 secret-ops as redacted-reference scaffolding. Gate check PASS (zero raw secrets), all artifacts sound, checker safe + 4 tests green, refusal episode correctly ratified. Live-credential build stays stop-gated pending explicit user approval.
